detail: spec gate round 1: the combat-log distills-subject claims (an unratified strategy still counts; only Ship/Kill gate a retirement) were asserted in README prose with no backing scenario; added one scanner.feature scenario and one plan-retirement.feature scenario to cover them, then re-judged ALIGNED

impl gate: the plan-retirement SKILL.md/README.md operating docs still framed distilled as caller-judgment and omitted the --ledger flag, contradicting the shipped mechanical gate (a node-absent caller would reproduce the very bug this CR closes); reframed both docs split-by-verifiability + fixed the by-hand fallback, then re-judged IMPLEMENTATION_PASS. Nearest-bucket cause: this is an operating-doc-vs-shipped-impl contradiction, not spec.md-vs-.feature — flagged as a candidate enum-precision follow-up
